unit_of_work: Q02 NO_HISTORY infrastructure repair and requeue
strategy_shape: Structural H4/D1 kangaroo-tail price action on four liquid forex pairs

source.title: Naked Forex: High-Probability Techniques for Trading Without Indicators

diversity_rationale: AUDUSD forex exposure diversifies the index/metal/energy-only Q08 survivor set, while the strategy is structural price action with no ML or banned indicators.

prior_failure.diagnosis: The T4 report was an empty 1970-period artifact with no expert, symbol, bars, or history context; it was not an OnInit or strategy verdict. The current cache audit now shows AUDUSD H4 history for 2017-2024 and 2026, including T4 cache for the exact 2024-07-01 through 2024-12-31 prescreen window.

repair.source_change: Moved the callable and framework news filters below position management and exits so news blackouts gate entries only, then refreshed the binary against the committed framework snapshot.
repair.setfile_change: Regenerated build hashes for all eight H4/D1 backtest setfiles without changing strategy parameters.

verification.cache_audit: AUDUSD.DWX H4 history=2017-2024,2026; T4 tester cache includes 2024-07-01..2024-12-31
verification.build_check_advisory: The static .DWX spread advisory is a false positive: spread<=0 explicitly returns false from Strategy_NoTradeFilter, so zero modeled spread fails open.

q02_requeue.duplicate_guard: BEGIN IMMEDIATE found no in-flight or newer AUDUSD Q02+ work item before insertion.
